content:
CrossFit W.O.D
Strength:
Every 01:30MOMx10 Sets:
1 Squat Snatch

Metcon:
5 Rounds For Time:
200m Run
7 Ring Dips
5 Power Cleans #80/55kg

CrossFit Endurance
E05:00MOMx8 Alternating Rounds:

1.)400m Run
Into AMRAP:
30 Double Unders
20 V-ups
15 2DB Hang Clean&Jerks #2x15/10kg

2.)500/400m Row
Into AMRAP:
30 Double Unders
20 Box Jumps #60/50cm
15 WallBall Shots #10/6kg
